judgements.reason: Reasoning (Google Cloud Anthropic GB300 + TPU + Meta GB300 + Thinking Machines A4X Max + Amazon $25B/5GW Trainium precondition, Oracle/IBM/Coreweave inference repositioning consequence, Q3 2026 three-cloud oligopoly landing) holds. May 1 rel=5 dim=given Microsoft/OpenAI/AWS reset puts OpenAI on Bedrock as first cross-cloud frontier deployment in a post-exclusivity world; May 2 Pentagon 7-vendor classified-network deal cements the AWS/Microsoft/Google federally-sanctioned cohort.

Seven bridges Apr 26 - May 2 support the prediction at rel=1-5 across given/because. No contradicts. The May 2 rel=1 entry correctly notes Pentagon deal cements rather than expands the cohort, which is consistent with the oligopoly thesis.

Three Needs (hyperscaler infra capacity lead lock-in via GB300/TPU/Trainium2; frontier-lab capacity strategist diversifying training across 2+ poles; fourth-cloud PMs at Oracle/IBM/Coreweave repositioning on inference) all status=open. Multi-year capacity-and-equity term sheets active but not yet final; cross-pole runtime-agnostic backends not yet shipped; inference-tuned FP4/MXFP4 SKUs not yet broadly published.

Seven chain edges and six relations cohere. Parallel with 24c0c80f and 3a5f7303d1a57312 are upstream/peer framings; parallel with af6de8a (5-pole alliance) is the structural source. No upstream contradicted; no equivalents requiring evidence reflow.
